title: antirrhinum majus subvar. glabrum
intro: Antirrhinum majus subvar. glabrum, commonly known as the downy snapdragon, is a plant species that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) and is characterized by its downy leaves and white flowers. The medicinal properties of Antirrhinum majus subvar. glabrum include its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve respiratory problems, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Antirrhinum majus subvar. glabrum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
